programme.title: Bob's Burgers
programme.desc: Ancient Misbehavin': When Louise, Rudy and Millie keep missing out on clay coins given as prizes at their ancient Greek history class, they plot a scheme of revenge. [S,AD] S12 Ep15

programme.title: G'wed
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series providing an honest, uplifting and heart-warming portrayal of teenagers from Liverpool. The countdown for the legendary party Scousechella is on and the whole school scrambles to get tickets, Christopher struggles with the anniversary of his mother's passing away as a misunderstanding about the next steps in his relationship with Aimee threatens their bond, and Reece wrestles with feelings of irrelevance given that both Connor and his mum seem to be moving on without him. Scousechella itself lives up to its hype and wild reputation, but things take a turn back at the school when a mysterious hacker named Ye Ma leaks footage from the party and reveals uncomfortable truths about relationships and consent - involving Reece, Aimee, Connor and Lauren - that leaves friendships and reputations hanging by a thread.

programme.title: G'wed
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series providing an honest, uplifting and heart-warming portrayal of teenagers from Liverpool. Mia-Louise heads to a gaming expo where she unexpectedly comes face to face with her online partner James and the gap in age between them is finally revealed, and Connor finds himself at the centre of a school scandal when he is accused of sexually assaulting Lauren at Scousechella - meanwhile, Lauren struggles to reclaim her voice about what happened while everyone else showcases theirs, and especially in the case of The Brimble who escalates the drama and tensions with a podcast on consent. While Barnaby tries to find out who might have borrowed money from the Lamberts, another cult member dies suspiciously - the police uncover existence of a promissory note and discover that the man who witnessed it died the same night as the Lamberts. programme.desc: When a farmer is found horribly murdered in the middle of a stone circle, suspicion points at a group of druids - DCI John Barnaby and DS Jones hurry to the scene of the crime and are joined by new pathologist Kate Wilding on her first assignment. Druid high priest Leticia Clifford shows Barnaby that sacred ley lines run through the stone circle and is later convinced that she has made an exciting discovery - however, she is stabbed to death before she can share her theory. When a third body is then found, Barnaby starts to believe that basic human greed rather than spiritualism is the real motive for murder...

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Detective drama series based on the novels by Ann Cleeves. When a woman is found killed in a remote cottage in the dramatic Northumberland countryside, DI Vera Stanhope is taken back to a place full of childhood memories and an unsolved case from her own past. She and her team delve into the local politics surrounding a controversial proposal to dig a new quarry and find motives for murder in the unlikeliest of places. As they uncover further shadowy liaisons and conflicting sympathies, the police come to realise that the truth could be hidden within the land itself.

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Drama series exploring the personal and professional lives of two female detectives in Manchester. Gill introduces her new sergeant to Will Pemberton, an ambitious detective superintendent on his way to the top. However, Rachel and Will have been enjoying a passionate yet discreet affair for the past few months; Will wants to go public, but Rachel would prefer to keep it quiet as she is worried about how others might judge her. Inspired by Eleanor's happy home life, Janet determines to persevere with the dating game, but a speed dating evening proves a disaster when she realises that she is unable to step out of character and has been interviewing every man there as if he was a suspect. The latest case involves the murder of a woman in a Manchester hotel; with only a necklace and the name Lola to go on, Syndicate Nine try to piece together her last known movements. When a witness comes forward to report a troubling sexual encounter, it seems that a hook-up site could hold the answers.

programme.title: Scott & Bailey

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series about a curmudgeonly GP. Louisa is grumpy and can't sleep because Martin can't sleep - Mrs Tishell and Jennifer continue their battle of wills in the chemist when Louisa comes in and asks for something to help with sleep. Jennifer suggests lavender oil which Mrs Tishell dismisses as a herbal remedy, but this doesn't put Louisa off and she douses Martin's pillow with the oil - however, Martin can smell it a mile off and Louisa has to come clean. Elsewhere, Martin treats the local hypochondriac and becomes concerned that he may have been exposed to asbestos while doing roof conversions in the village, and Jennifer is worried when she and Mrs Tishell get a letter from the Pharmaceutical Council saying that Mrs Tishell no longer needs supervision - Bert is miserable about Jennifer leaving as Al tells him that he should do something to get her to stay, and that is exactly what he does...

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series about a curmudgeonly GP. Louisa tries to get Martin to open up about the loss of his father, but Martin says that it doesn't affect him - when Louisa suggests a break so they can all get away and spend some time together, Martin doesn't want to and Louisa is hurt by this. At the same time, things are strained between Martin and his mother - she is trying to connect with him, but he is cutting her off. Elsewhere, Mrs Tishell is smitten by the hand-holding and the staring into her eyes of the Doc during a routine examination and falls head over heels in love with him again, there is a visit at the police station by two military policemen looking for Mike Pruddy, and the wind is taken out of Al's sails when he tells his dad about a business idea he has - to be a middleman between tourists wanting fishing trips and the fishermen - and Bert laughs at the idea as he thinks there is no way that the fishermen will give him a ten per cent cut of their take.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: The final episode of the detective drama series. Lewis and Hathaway are called in to investigate when an idyllic Oxford summer's day is shattered by a parcel bomb - the victim of the attack is eminent mathematician Adam Capstone, a genius in the field of knot theory. Adam was notorious for his numerous affairs with attractive young students, so could his wife have the motive to want him dead?

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Drama series exploring the personal and professional lives of two female detectives in Manchester. Meanwhile, when Janet discovers that Elise's heart is being broken by Eleanor's son, her maternal instincts make her want to rescue her daughter and bring her home. At the same time, a couple are shot at close range in their pub in the early hours, leaving their son Simon feeling utterly alone as he lost his sister Carla when he was three. Howeverm when his aunt is identifying the bodies, she tells them that Carla did not die, but was disowned by the family after failed attempts at rehab...

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Drama series exploring the personal and professional lives of two female detectives in Manchester. programme.title: The Irrational

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: From 2014. A sergeant who specializes in counter-espionage is found murdered. The investigation reveals that the victim's wife has been taken hostage and that the kidnappers are demanding a ransom for her.

programme.title: NCIS

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Potomac
programme.desc: From 2024. From 2024. As news of Karen's car accident and drunk driving spreads, the ladies rally around her, but not without asking some critical questions. Wendy closes an important chapter in her life.

programme.title: The Irrational

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: From 2014. It's Halloween and the NCIS team investigates the murder of a woman who worked at the military court. She was found dead in a cemetery in costume and with a vampire-like wound on her neck.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: From 2021. When a successful financial advisor is found shot to death on a military base, NCIS investigates the case by interviewing the victim's three-dimensional hologram of herself, which she created before her death.

programme.title: The Hateful Eight
programme.desc: Quentin Tarantino's 8th film takes place in wintry Wyoming, where eight strangers, including two bounty hunters and a wanted fugitive, find themselves battling the elements and each other.

programme.title: Battleship
programme.desc: In Battleship, Earth battles a powerful alien force across sea, sky, and land. Directed by Peter Berg and starring Liam Neeson, Taylor Kitsch, and Rihanna, it's explosive action at sea.

programme.title: The Hunger Games
programme.desc: Every district in the nation of Panem must send a boy and girl to fight to the death in the annual Hunger Games competition. Jennifer Lawrence is 16-year-old Katniss Everdeen, who volunteers to take her younger sister's place in the games.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: In *Oblivion*, Tom Cruise stars as a man on a journey of redemption in a future Earth. Directed by the creator of *TRON: Legacy*, it's a visually stunning sci-fi adventure about confronting the past to save humanity.

programme.title: The Man With The Iron Fists
programme.desc: RZA co-writes, directs, and stars in this genre-blending, hip-hop-infused kung fu film set in Hong Kong, featuring Russell Crowe, Lucy Liu, and produced by Quentin Tarantino.

programme.title: The Man With The Iron Fists
programme.desc: Dalam perburuan harta karun emas yang melegenda, sekelompok prajurit, pembunuh, dan seorang prajurit Inggris yang jahat mendatangi sebuah desa di Tiongkok feodal, tempat seorang pandai besi yang rendah hati berupaya membela dirinya dan penduduk desa lainnya.

programme.title: Jason Bourne
programme.desc: Matt Damon returns as Jason Bourne in Jason Bourne, with director Paul Greengrass back for another thrilling chapter. Bourne is drawn out of hiding, facing new dangers with Alicia Vikander, Vincent Cassel, and more.

programme.title: Jason Bourne
programme.desc: Jason Bourne kembali muncul setelah lama bersembunyi ketika Nicky Parsons membocorkan data rahasia CIA. Diburu tanpa ampun, Bourne harus menghadapi masa lalunya dan menghancurkan operasi gelap penuh pembunuhan dan pengkhianatan

programme.title: Shaolin Vs. Evil Dead 2: Ultimate Power
programme.desc: A kung fu fighter's Taoist priest friend has turned into a vampire, hell-bent on leading his legion of vampires to bring eternal darkness to the nation.

programme.title: Shaolin Vs Evil Dead 2
programme.desc: Alur cerita semakin rumit ketika para pahlawan, Pak dan Hak, menemukan rencana mengerikan dari seorang jenius jahat bernama "DR. Magma" yang menghidupkan kembali orang mati yang jahat dan memaksa mereka melawan para biksu Shaolin yang telah menguasai seni bela diri.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Catching Fire
programme.desc: Katniss Everdeen has returned home safe after winning the 74th Annual Hunger Games. She senses that a rebellion is simmering, but the Capitol is still very much in control as the next Hunger Games is prepared—a competition that could change Panem forever.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Catching Fire (Rock Action)
programme.desc: Katniss Everdeen dan Peeta Mellark menjadi target Capitol setelah kemenangan mereka dalam Hunger Games ke-74 memicu pemberontakan di Distrik Panem.

programme.title: Jason Bourne
programme.desc: Matt Damon returns as Jason Bourne in Jason Bourne, with director Paul Greengrass back for another thrilling chapter. Bourne is drawn out of hiding, facing new dangers with Alicia Vikander, Vincent Cassel, and more.

programme.title: Jason Bourne
programme.desc: Jason Bourne kembali muncul setelah lama bersembunyi ketika Nicky Parsons membocorkan data rahasia CIA. Diburu tanpa ampun, Bourne harus menghadapi masa lalunya dan menghancurkan operasi gelap penuh pembunuhan dan pengkhianatan

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay Part 1
programme.desc: The worldwide phenomenon continues. Katniss (Jennifer Lawrence) has survived and destroyed the Hunger Games, and now rises with District 13 to fight against President Snow (Donald Sutherland).

programme.title: Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Pt 1 (Rock Action)
programme.desc: Katniss Everdeen berada di Distrik 13 setelah ia menghancurkan dunia game selamanya. Di bawah kepemimpinan Presiden Coin dan nasihat dari teman-teman kepercayaannya, Katniss mengembangkan sayapnya saat ia berjuang menyelamatkan Peeta dan bangsa yang tergerak oleh keberaniannya.

programme.title: Get Out
programme.desc: Chris joins his girlfriend Rose for a weekend at her family's estate. At first, their warm welcome seems like awkwardness about their interracial relationship—until disturbing truths emerge.

programme.title: Get Out
programme.desc: Seorang pemuda Afrika-Amerika mengunjungi orangtua pacarnya yang berkulit putih untuk akhir pekan, di mana kegelisahannya yang membara tentang penerimaan mereka terhadapnya akhirnya mencapai titik didih.

programme.title: Shaolin Vs. Evil Dead 2: Ultimate Power

Pengawal dari Beijing membantu polisi Hong Kong melindunginya. Namun, ia dan saksi tersebut mulai memiliki perasaan, yang memperumit keadaan.

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: Price drop and range revolution. Electric cars overcome old prejudices. The Dacia Spring is one of the cheapest electric cars on the market. A real bargain or are there hidden catches? Volvo's answer to Tesla & Co. The new XC 40 comes with an extended range. How effective is it on a mountain road trip? (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Power Fighter, New Highway, or Low Rider Muscle: Aggressively unusual names for unusual vehicles. In a tranquil Bavarian village, the company Boom Trikes Fahrzeugbau GmbH assembles the coolest tricycles in the republic. With the quality seal "Made in Germany", the small company has developed into Europe's leading trike manufacturer in just under 25 years. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Spotted
programme.desc: Cross is more possible – racing driver Tim Schrick and drift professional Werner Gusenbauer reveal their tricks. The legendary Subaru WRX STI on a drift mission in wintry Austria. Also: The Volvo XC40 becomes a stunt partner. Will the spectacular self-experiment with the Swede and a snowboard succeed? And: The Porsche Cayenne Turbo. The supposedly sportiest full-size SUV in the world tested in Crete. (Station info).

programme.title: NASCAR University
programme.desc: Martin Truex Jr. is now one of the most famous personalities in the NASCAR world and for good reason: in 2017, the driver of the #78 won the Monster Energy NASCAR Cup Series. However, the path to becoming a NASCAR champion was not always easy and required a lot of strength and endurance from him. NASCAR University looks at the career of Martin Truex Jr. with all successes and defeats. (Station info).

programme.title: 4x4 – Das Allrad Magazin
programme.desc: There are SUV models that have proven themselves, such as the Range Rover. The British manufacturer is building on this and is launching a small Rangy with the Velar in order to appeal to even more customers. In addition to Range Rover-typical luxury, the Velar should particularly score points with its chic look. Jeep relies on the tried and tested: The design of the Wrangler has remained almost the same for over 60 years. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: The new mobile magazine presents the latest trends and innovations in the automotive industry every week. Whether compact everyday heroes, windy city runabouts for the urban jungle, beefy SUVs for family trips or modern electric and hydrogen vehicles: our experts will take you on a test drive through the world of automobility of today and tomorrow. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: The Nürburgring race track in the Eifel has lost none of its appeal for decades. The oldie and youngtimer scene is also addicted to the black Eifel asphalt. This speed drug breathes new life into the gray panthers and ensures pure racing action. Today is race day in the Eifel: over 100 racing oldies are on the traditional route. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: A new test for the stunt people from Action Concept. They are supposed to create a spectacular motorcycle flight followed by a crash in a car. That would be far too dangerous even for a stuntman. That's why stunt coordinator Ramazan Bulut comes up with something and builds a cannon to shoot the motorcycle. But does it have enough power to throw the motorcycle quickly and sufficiently far into the air? The result surprises even our hardened stunt heroes! An exciting report from the world of film stunt people. (Station info).

programme.title: Dumbest Stuff on Wheels
programme.desc: Bizarre mishaps, weird crashes and unbelievable nonsense on four wheels, fabricated in everyday life and immortalized on camera. Great workout for your laughing muscles! (Station info).

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: An inconspicuous industrial building in Regensburg, Bavaria. The most innovative German bicycle manufacturer is currently based here: PG Bikes. The Regensburg-based company develops and produces electric bikes with a retro look. The boss and idea generator of PG Bikes is 33-year-old Manuel Ostner. After owning his own scooter workshop, he began pimping up bicycles and eventually producing e-bikes. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: A container on a gravel lot, surrounded by a colorful mix of used cars, some still in good shape, others a little polished - the previous owner has already left his fingerprint here. What is behind these slightly cranky-looking car dealers? In Motorvision TV, people in the automotive profession tell their stories. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: For the first time in its glorious and long history, the traditional Italian brand Ducati is venturing into the cruiser segment. With a long and flat silhouette and forward footrests for comfortable gliding, the 156 hp The new Duc is supposed to conquer the US market and beat Harley-Davidson not only with its own weapons, but with completely new ones. MOTORVISION TV tested the new XDiavel in San Diego on classic cruiser terrain. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: It is the vision of an electric future from AMG: The Concept AMG GT XX delivers an incredible 1360 hp and charges faster than you can say range anxiety. We were there for the spectacular world premiere. And: This racer looks like it came out of a retro film but is the brand new top model from Morgan. We reveal five exciting facts about this British work of art. (Station info).

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: Magazine for motorcycle fans for whom motorcycling is not just a hobby, but a way of life. Whether Ducati or Kawasaki, Suzuki or the classic Harley Davidson, whether an off-the-shelf motorcycle or a specially made custom bike. There are reports about biker clubs and real enthusiasts, about tours, meetings and events. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic
programme.desc: Classic cars and everything that goes with them: events, racing, portraits, mechanic tips and the most beautiful pictures from the automobile archives from all over the world. The most beautiful oldies, the hottest racing cars from bygone eras. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: They guarantee an exclusive appearance and stand for status, prestige and perfection more than any other vehicle, the international limousines from Rolls Royce, Bentley, Mercedes, BMW and Jaguar. They are the crowning achievement of global automotive creation and define the standard of grandiose luxury and elegant comfort. Dream Cars presents the most expensive, luxurious and exclusive limousines in the world. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Top Speed ​​is celebrating a special anniversary. In this issue we look back at 250 episodes that we produced in German for Motorvision. Moderator Martin Utberg shows the most beautiful moments, special encounters and unforgettable vehicles from the past few years - told personally and to the point. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: lassic Rides rummages through the automotive treasure chest and brings to light some almost forgotten, some noble, some bizarre cars from the last few decades. (Station info).

programme.title: Four-wheel drive adventure
programme.desc: A special interest magazine about off-road and all-wheel drive vehicles. The focus is on off-road veterans and cars with four-wheel drive. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: Nobody is faster, nobody is more reliable, nobody is more successful. Whether Le Mans, the Monte Carlo Rally or Formula 1: There is no race or rally that Porsche has not won, 28,000 times in 65 years. World record. Porsche wins a race with the first prototype, unforgettable the successes of the James Dean sypder at the Carrera Panamericana or the Targa Florio. In 1970 the first Le Mans victory with the 'monster', the Porsche 917. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: Compact, modern, electric! E-SUVs are conquering our big cities. Volvo is sending the EX30 to attract customers. The brand's new smallest model is supposed to impress with Swedish coolness and plenty of power. The Renault Scenic E-Tech is half a size larger. After many successful years of the combustion engine variant, the French are giving the minivan batteries and an SUV silhouette. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Cars look impressive on the outside - no one hides their sporting ambitions. At the Ford Focus ST 5 tournament, it quickly becomes clear through spoilers, wide tires, painted brake calipers, ST logos, but above all through the centrally placed exhaust pipe and the exciting engine sound that the family is not supposed to travel with this car, but that dad wants to go on the motorway on Sunday - and alone! (Station info).

programme.title: Australian Superbike Championship 2024
programme.desc: The ASBK is an Australian motorcycle championship with up to seven events per season (channel info).

programme.title: Gearing Up 2026
programme.desc: Pure passion for racing, extraordinary talent and thrills right up to the last second - that's what this magazine promises, reporting on the most exciting motorsport events. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: Compact high-performance models have a long-standing tradition at BMW. From the 2002 turbo to the 1 Series M Coupe to the current M2. We take a closer look at the second generation and test the drifting potential, racing and everyday qualities of the M2. What does he do best? We also look at its history and development and take a look at its competitors. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Robust and popular - these are the keywords for these models. Subaru has renamed the XV. Completely renovated and with the new name Cros-strek, the SUV is now looking for customers. We reveal what's behind it. And Cupra is giving its bestseller Formentor an update that is particularly causing a visual sensation. We explain why. (Station info).

programme.title: 4x4 – Das Allrad Magazin
programme.desc: Sand, scree, water or asphalt Adventures can be had on any surface if you have the right vehicle. The Can-Am Outlander and Maverick R are the ultimate fun machines for off-road driving fun. We put them to the test in Portugal. And this is supposed to be a Smart? Yes, actually #5 turns everything we thought we knew about the popular kissing ball upside down. (Station info).

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: The north of Thailand is a popular travel destination, not just for adventurous individual tourists. The north is known for its mountainous, densely forested areas and therefore this region is also a paradise for motorcyclists. Thousands of curves on well-developed roads with little traffic and a diversity of culture and landscape make this region a perfect holiday destination for us to escape the winter in Germany for the fourth time. We will take you on a 1600 km long motorcycle tour to the most beautiful places in northern Thailand. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: Electric cars can't be sporty? But at least with the right boost. The Alpine A290 is intended to bring the brand's racing DNA into the electric age. We'll check whether it works and shed light on the French manufacturer's legendary rally history. And the VW ID.4 GTX shows that electric SUVs can be more than just family cars. We reveal 5 exciting facts. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2026
programme.desc: The Isle of Man Tourist Trophy is considered the toughest and most dangerous motorcycle race in the world, with riders reaching speeds of up to 200mph. (Station info).

programme.title: NZ Jetsprint Championship 2025
programme.desc: The New Zealand Jetsprint Championship is the most important sprint boat competition from New Zealand, the country where the sport was founded in 1981. Jetsprinting is comparable to rally sports, but there is only one boat on the track at any given time and boats drive at very high speeds. The up to 500 HP strong jet sprint boats therefore try to achieve the best time on the tracks. (Senderinfo).

programme.title: UIM F1H2O World Powerboat Championship 2025
programme.desc: Curtain up for Formula 1 in motorboat racing: According to the world umbrella organization UIM, the H20 is the fastest outboard racing boat series in circuit racing and has been dominated by Philippe Chiappe for years. (Station info).

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: With us, television becomes a shopping mall: Our teleshopping partners bring interesting and innovative products from the areas of kitchen, household, beauty, wellness, leisure and fitness directly into the living room of TV viewers. (Station info).

programme.desc: With us, television becomes a shopping mall: Our teleshopping partners bring interesting and innovative products from the areas of kitchen, household, beauty, wellness, leisure and fitness directly into the living room of TV viewers. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Spotted
programme.desc: In the motherland of the V8, the craziest car show in the world is celebrated every year in Las Vegas. At Sema, manufacturers, tuners and customers present their concept cars, visions and hand-finished automotive treasures. Everything that has rank and name in the tuning scene comes together here. Whether hoonigan and professional speedster Ken Block, the German tuning legend JP alias Jean-Pierre Krämer and Porsche punk Magnus Walker. Everyone gets inspiration at SEMA. (Station info).

programme.title: 4x4 – Das Allrad Magazin
programme.desc: With 3.5 million units sold worldwide, the Mercedes Sprinter is one of the most popular commercial vehicles. In the third generation it is more modern than ever. Thanks to numerous connectivity applications, it is intended to make fleet management easier. It is also equipped with car-level comfort and safety features. We test the Sprinter around Amsterdam. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: In 2019, Porsche celebrated 70 years of sports car history. For this occasion, it was decided to recreate a completely new vehicle of the type 993 based on an existing original bodyshell - the unique "Project Gold". Also: the Q5 Sportback, Audi's mid-range SUV, in the test. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: Alfa Romeo's latest creation: The GTA version of the 147. The already pretty design of the 147 has been properly trimmed towards sportiness. Voluminous air inlets and outlets as well as bulbous wheel arches suit it very well. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: A gravel pit becomes a stunt laboratory: the stunt heroes from Action Concept test for their favorite production “Alarm for Cobra 11”. They send a motorcycle freestyle over a ramp and shoot themselves into the water with a specially built human catapult. They are also experimenting with a new system: This is designed to allow a prepared car to roll over several times in the sand at 70 km/h. Stuntwoman Tina takes over the job as driver! (Station info).

programme.title: Dumbest Stuff on Wheels
programme.desc: Bizarre mishaps, weird crashes and unbelievable nonsense on four wheels, fabricated in everyday life and immortalized on camera. Great workout for your laughing muscles! (Station info).

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: One of Europe's leading manufacturers of luxury caravans and premium motorhomes has its headquarters in Jandelsbrunn, Lower Bavaria: the Knaus Tabbert company. It all started in the mid-50s. At that time, Alfred Tabbert built the “Ideal”, the first caravan in series production. The 'Margrave' follows in 1960. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: Tonga is a constitutional monarchy. Peter Goldstern was already in the service of George Tupou the 5th's father. He is now one of the king's closest confidants and has received several awards. Only he is allowed and can fly the royal machine. That's why, even at the age of 70, he still takes the controls and drives the boss, including his dog on board, across the island archipelago. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: A great rattling in your ears is what you know about motorcycling. But the future could look or sound different, and quietly. Is this still real motorcycling or does the electric drive completely rob you of the emotion? To find out, we test the latest models from Can-Am, Pulse and Origin, and visit the first European festival for electric motorcycles in Berlin. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: It is considered the most successful luxury sedan in the world, a synonym for comfort and opulence and sets standards in terms of technology and safety: the Mercedes S-Class. But why is that so? What makes this vehicle so special and sets it apart from all others? We drive all model series, from the 450 SEL 6.9 to the current S 580 e, and explore the fascination of each model. (Station info).

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: Magazine for motorcycle fans for whom motorcycling is not just a hobby, but a way of life. Whether Ducati or Kawasaki, Suzuki or the classic Harley Davidson, whether an off-the-shelf motorcycle or a specially made custom bike. There are reports about biker clubs and real enthusiasts, about tours, meetings and events. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic
programme.desc: Chief Constable Aimo Rautianen from the Finnish town of Kuusankoski, which has a population of 22,000, goes on a mug hunt with a very special company car: a '76 Trabant L 601. It's not the only automotive curiosity from Finland. Timo Ukkonen is a talented hobbyist and turned his 1963 Skoda Octavia sedan into an original pickup. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: They are the most exciting cars in the world and arouse more desire than any other vehicle, the international coupes from Maserati, Porsche, Bentley, Mercedes and Rolls Royce. With their extraordinary design and powerful engines, coupes arouse more emotions than any other car; they are the epitome of elegance and exclusivity in automobile construction. Dream Cars presents the most breathtaking dream coupes in the world. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Moderator Martin Utberg and his team partner Sven Bössow are taking part in the Black Forest Winter Challenge, organized by the Hotel Ritter in Durbach, which is well-known among classic car lovers. For this occasion, Martin and Sven drive a Porsche 924 S from 1987. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: It looks like a Ferrari, but comes from the Lower Bavarian province: the Glas GT. Uwe Gusen is one of the few who are still interested in the Glas brand - because it is racing at full speed into oblivion. If you want to buy one, you should hurry up and know your way around. (Station info).

programme.title: Four-wheel drive adventure
programme.desc: Adventure Allrad, a special interest magazine about off-road and all-wheel drive vehicles. The focus is on off-road veterans and cars with four-wheel drive. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: For the joy of driving: That's what BMW, one of the most successful automobile companies in the world, stands for. The decidedly sporty automobiles and motorcycles from Bayrisch Motorenwerke AG are equally successful with customers and in racing. But the former aircraft engine manufacturer's entry into automobile production threatened to fail early on. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: The recipe for a successful car these days usually consists of: SUV shape and electric drive. The Avenger is Jeep's new smallest car in its lineup. The winner of the Car of the Year Award will go on a 250 kilometer road trip through Germany. The Cupra Tavascan is also the brand's first electric SUV. Can he set himself apart from his VW Group brothers? (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: The Mitsubishi Lancer began its career in the World Rally Championship in 1993 as the Evolution I. Off the road he shows what he can do and with great success. In 1996, Tommi Mäkinen achieved five World Championship race victories with the EVO III and won the title. But the success story doesn't end there. The Subaru WRX Sti is also extremely successful in rallying. What's interesting is that the two Japanese are so similar that they have been compared for model generations. Motorvision introduces the two opponents! (Station info).

programme.title: Australian Superbike Championship 2024
programme.desc: The ASBK is an Australian motorcycle championship with up to seven events per season (channel info).

programme.title: NZ Jetsprint Championship 2025
programme.desc: The New Zealand Jetsprint Championship is the most important sprint boat competition from New Zealand, the country where the sport was founded in 1981. Jetsprinting is comparable to rally sports, but there is only one boat on the track at any given time and boats drive at very high speeds. The up to 500 HP strong jet sprint boats therefore try to achieve the best time on the tracks. (Senderinfo).

programme.title: UIM F1H2O World Powerboat Championship 2025
programme.desc: Curtain up for Formula 1 in motorboat racing: According to the world umbrella organization UIM, the H20 is the fastest outboard racing boat series in circuit racing and has been dominated by Philippe Chiappe for years. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2026
programme.desc: The Isle of Man Tourist Trophy is considered the toughest and most dangerous motorcycle race in the world, with riders reaching speeds of up to 200mph. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Top Speed ​​is all about classic automobiles. Moderator Martin Utberg actively takes part in the most beautiful classic car events in the world. Here you not only see old cars, but also experience the whole history of the classic jewels and their owners. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: Mercedes-Benz is the most successful automobile brand in motorsport. From the world's first car race in 1894 to today's Formula 1, Mercedes has been winning races all over the world for over 120 years. Whether Panamericana or Le Mans, DTM or Indianapolis, Silver Arrows or Formula 1, no other manufacturer has won as many races as Mercedes. The Mercedes racing drivers are always the greatest and most famous drivers of their time like Rudolf Carracciola, Juan Manuel Fangio or Lewis Hamilton. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Top Speed ​​is all about classic automobiles. Moderator Martin Utberg actively takes part in the most beautiful classic car events in the world. Here you not only see old cars, but also experience the whole history of the classic jewels and their owners. (Station info).

programme.title: Racing Files
programme.sub-title: McLaren – from Formula 1 to Can Am
programme.desc: McLaren is the second oldest active team in Formula 1 and now enjoys worldwide fame. However, when it was founded, hardly anyone would have expected that the team founded by New Zealand racing driver Bruce McLaren would develop into a heavyweight in the world of super sports cars and one of the best-known teams in motorsport. Racing Files tells the story of McLaren. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: It is the fastest art collection in the world: Designed by Andy Warhol, Roy Liechtenstein, Frank Stella and Jeff Koons, the world's most famous artists, BMW has been launching the racing art objects at Le Mans for many years. Whether it's the BMW M1, the Le Mans prototype or the M3 GT2, the BMW Art Cars are the most extraordinary cars in the history of Le Mans. At the helm of the world's fastest works of art are the world's fastest pilots, Hans-Joachim Stuck, Manfred Winkelhock and Andy Priaulx. Car History shows the history of the BMW Art Cars at Le Mans, with many original sounds from Jeff Koons, Frank Stella, Hans Stuck and Andy Priaulx. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The highlights from all eras of automobile history: When the brand new Mercedes A-Class fell over in the moose test, when Stirling Moss won the Mille Miglia in record time, when Ferdinand Porsche amazed the world with an electric car in 1900. Exciting images show the viewer what really happened. Contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. Half a century of Ferrari. Rearview Mirror gets to the bottom of the Ferrari myth and takes a closer look at the red racers from Maranello. (Station info).

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: With us, television becomes a shopping mall: Our teleshopping partners bring interesting and innovative products from the areas of kitchen, household, beauty, wellness, leisure and fitness directly into the living room of TV viewers. (Station info).

programme.title: Spotted
programme.desc: England Special. England is the craziest car country in the world: the steering wheel is on the right, driving is on the left, UK cars offer everything but average. Whether Aston Martin, Jaguar, Bentley or Morgan and McLaren, MV Spotted shows the most spectacular UK convertibles, coupes and supercars. MV Spotted also shows the tics of the British, bizarre competitions such as lawnmower racing and the cult of James Bond. (Station info).

programme.title: 4x4 – Das Allrad Magazin
programme.desc: Porsche is exiting the diesel business. Hybrids like the Cayenne E-Hybrid should become more important. We tested its 3.2 liter average consumption. We also explore the region around Spartenburg in the BMW X4 – the birthplace of the coupé SAV. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: On the occasion of Skoda's 125th anniversary, we look back at the eventful history of one of the oldest automobile manufacturers in the world. Also: our practical test of the Volkswagen ID.3, the first purely electric car from VW. And: the McLaren 720S Spider, the super sports car is now also available as a convertible. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: Evil eye, explosive power – outlaw image: street fighter. 20 years ago they were still rare lone warriors and are now part of everyday street life. But where does this trend actually come from – and how has it developed further? We find answers at the Fighterama sports and tuning trade fair - the annual meeting place for customizing and tuning beyond the Harley. The chief fighter is the trade fair organizer Markus Broix - here at the befitting donut burn - he was there from the start. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: Stuntman Dominik is an expert in falls and body stunts. But today he has to drive the stunt car. The task: drive straight through a truck and do a complete rollover. Firstly: The number is not for the faint of heart. Second: The number is dangerous! (Station info).

programme.title: Dumbest Stuff on Wheels
programme.desc: Bizarre mishaps, weird crashes and unbelievable nonsense on four wheels, fabricated in everyday life and immortalized on camera. Great workout for your laughing muscles! (Station info).

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: A TV portrait! Abt Sportsline is the world's largest refiner of vehicles from the Volkswagen Group and is closely linked to the Audi brand. The company's second pillar: motorsport. Whether DTM, formula or GT racing. The abbots are always at the forefront. A company with a unique success story and constant growth. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: Dubai - city of luxury, fast cars and incredible stories. Just like a man's: his passion is cars: fast cars. Nice cars. Special cars. And he has two dream jobs: He is a racing driver and president of the Porsche Club in the United Arab Emirates. Karim Al Azhari loves and lives luxury, but every now and then he is really stressed. For example, when, like now, he has to organize a motorsport event on the Abu Dhabi racing circuit. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: Motorcycle riding fun is diverse. Some like retro, others look to the future. We test the Royal Enfield Shotgun 650 in an old-school look and reveal exciting facts about the Indian manufacturer with British roots. Also: Electric motorcycles aren't fun? We check whether this is true and take a closer look at the Can-Am Pulse electric city cruiser. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: Which sports car fan doesn't secretly dream of a Porsche 911. It is THE sports car from Germany. Compact, iconic and stable in value. And that despite the fact that with over 1.3 million units it is one of the most produced sports cars of all time. Classic car dealer Michael Schnabl, founder of Motorlegenden, makes car dreams come true. His specialty: rare and incredibly expensive Porsche models. (Station info).

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: Magazine for motorcycle fans for whom motorcycling is not just a hobby, but a way of life. Whether Ducati or Kawasaki, Suzuki or the classic Harley Davidson, whether an off-the-shelf motorcycle or a specially made custom bike. There are reports about biker clubs and real enthusiasts, about tours, meetings and events. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic
programme.desc: An extremely powerful V8 engine embedded in a delicate roadster body: The AC Cobra is more animal than car with simply adventurous driving characteristics. Rolf Versen has been driving a Cobra for 30 years and is still loyal to his reptile. Also: Classic celebrates the French all-round genius Lucien Rosengartd and his speedsters. And: On the road with friends of old fire engines. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: They are the most spectacular convertibles in the world, two-seater racing cars without a roof, built for top speeds of over 300 kilometers per hour, built for unique driving pleasure, the super sports convertibles from Ferrari, Lamborghini, Porsche, Bentley and McLaren. Engines with more than 500 hp, chassis from Formula 1, as well as breathtaking body shapes, SuperSport convertibles are the most fascinating of all automobiles. Dream Cars presents the fastest and most exclusive SuperSport convertibles in the world. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic
programme.desc: The Reliant Scimitar is virtually unknown in Germany, but in England it was a car with a kind of cult status just a few decades ago. This is probably why the British royal family used this vehicle as a means of transport for many years. Classic introduces the exotic. Plus: a transport wonder on three wheels. The Moto Guzzi Hercules saves many a small farmer. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: Classic Rides rummages through the automotive treasure chest and brings to light some almost forgotten, some noble, some bizarre cars from the last few decades. (Station info).

programme.title: Four-wheel drive adventure
programme.desc: A special interest magazine about off-road and all-wheel drive vehicles. The focus is on off-road veterans and cars with four-wheel drive. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: It's the James Dean Porsche, the 550 Spyder. It is small, flat and fast. And it will only be built 140 times. Nevertheless, the Porsche 550 Spyder makes history. It is the first racing sports car from Porsche, and it laid the foundation for the sports car manufacturer from Stuttgart to be considered a major player in racing today. There is no race that he doesn't win, he has been considered unbeatable for many years. And it is the car in which Hollywood star James Dean had a fatal accident. The accident makes Dean and the 550 Spyder a legend. Car History tells the whole story of the dream car from the 1950s. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: Electric cars are emotionless and boring? These electric cars want to prove the opposite: The VW ID. Buzz GTX throws all-wheel drive and 340 hp into the ring. But how athletic is he really? And this isn't an electric car at all, at least that's how it's supposed to sound and feel. The Hyundai Ioniq 5 N makes you think you are sitting in a high-performance gasoline engine. We reveal how exactly this works. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Audi A1 quattro vs Renault Clio R.S. – two crazy small cars in the Perfect Ride comparison test! The Audi A1 quattro has a 1.2 liter 4-cylinder turbo engine with 256 hp. Top speed: 245. Renault has with the Clio R.S. turned one of its most traditional models into a powerful little racing machine: 1.6 liter 4-cylinder turbo, 200 hp and a top speed of 225 km/h. Two spirited racers, neither of whom knows exactly where they belong: on the racetrack or in the city. (Station info).

programme.title: Australian Superbike Championship 2024
programme.desc: In the third part of the 6th ASBK event at One Raceway we will once again focus on the juniors in the Oceania Junior Cup, the R3 Cup and the Supersport 300 class. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Top Speed ​​is all about classic automobiles. Moderator Martin Utberg actively takes part in the most beautiful classic car events in the world. Here you not only see old cars, but also experience the whole history of the classic jewels and their owners. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: Mercedes-Benz is the most successful automobile brand in motorsport. From the world's first car race in 1894 to today's Formula 1, Mercedes has been winning races all over the world for over 120 years. Whether Panamericana or Le Mans, DTM or Indianapolis, Silver Arrows or Formula 1, no other manufacturer has won as many races as Mercedes. The Mercedes racing drivers are always the greatest and most famous drivers of their time like Rudolf Carracciola, Juan Manuel Fangio or Lewis Hamilton. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic
programme.desc: Classic cars and everything that goes with them: events, racing, portraits, mechanic tips and the most beautiful pictures from the automobile archives from all over the world. The most beautiful oldies, the hottest racing cars from bygone eras. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Top Speed ​​is all about classic automobiles. Moderator Martin Utberg actively takes part in the most beautiful classic car events in the world. Here you not only see old cars, but also experience the whole history of the classic jewels and their owners. (Station info).

programme.title: Racing Files
programme.sub-title: McLaren – from Formula 1 to Can Am
programme.desc: McLaren is the second oldest active team in Formula 1 and now enjoys worldwide fame. However, when it was founded, hardly anyone would have expected that the team founded by New Zealand racing driver Bruce McLaren would develop into a heavyweight in the world of super sports cars and one of the best-known teams in motorsport. Racing Files tells the story of McLaren. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2026
programme.desc: Another total cancellation of the race day on the Isle of Man due to the weather, but instead we had the opportunity to talk in more detail with the Crowe brothers and Davey Todd and take a look back at the most spectacular races of the week. (Station info).

programme.title: Icelandic Formula Offroad 2025
programme.desc: Formula Off Road was invented in Iceland. Hoping to raise more money for the Icelandic rescue teams, the teams began showing their 4WD cars in action in the Icelandic hills. (Station info).

programme.title: All Wheel Drive Safari Challenge 2025
programme.desc: The "AWDC" is a British off-road event in which drivers have to tackle narrow and winding roads full of mud and gravel (channel info).

programme.title: US Pro Pulling 2023
programme.desc: Motorsport like you've never seen it before. In this competition, drivers use multi-engine, modified tractors to pull a heavy sled around the track. Some tractors can even produce more than 12,000 horsepower. This makes tractor pulling the strongest motorsport in the world. (Station info).

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: With us, television becomes a shopping mall: Our teleshopping partners bring interesting and innovative products from the areas of kitchen, household, beauty, wellness, leisure and fitness directly into the living room of TV viewers. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.desc: In 1976 and the following years, BMW was particularly successful in motorsport. Numerous victories and successes on different vehicles were achieved for BMW Motorsport. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Gearing Up 2026
programme.desc: Pure passion for racing, extraordinary talent and thrills right up to the last second - that's what this magazine promises, reporting on the most exciting motorsport events. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: Compact high-performance models have a long-standing tradition at BMW. From the 2002 turbo to the 1 Series M Coupe to the current M2. We take a closer look at the second generation and test the drifting potential, racing and everyday qualities of the M2. What does he do best? We also look at its history and development and take a look at its competitors. (Station info).

programme.title: 4x4 – Das Allrad Magazin
programme.desc: Sand, scree, water or asphalt Adventures can be had on any surface if you have the right vehicle. The Can-Am Outlander and Maverick R are the ultimate fun machines for off-road driving fun. We put them to the test in Portugal. And this is supposed to be a Smart? Yes, actually #5 turns everything we thought we knew about the popular kissing ball upside down. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Robust and popular - these are the keywords for these models. Subaru has renamed the XV. Completely renovated and with the new name Cros-strek, the SUV is now looking for customers. We reveal what's behind it. And Cupra is giving its bestseller Formentor an update that is particularly causing a visual sensation. We explain why. (Station info).

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: The north of Thailand is a popular travel destination, not just for adventurous individual tourists. The north is known for its mountainous, densely forested areas and therefore this region is also a paradise for motorcyclists. Thousands of curves on well-developed roads with little traffic and a diversity of culture and landscape make this region a perfect holiday destination for us to escape the winter in Germany for the fourth time. We will take you on a 1600 km long motorcycle tour to the most beautiful places in northern Thailand. (Station info).

programme.title: NZ Jetsprint Championship 2025
programme.desc: The New Zealand Jetsprint Championship is the most important sprint boat competition from New Zealand, the country where the sport was founded in 1981. Jetsprinting is comparable to rally sports, but there is only one boat on the track at any given time and boats drive at very high speeds. The up to 500 HP strong jet sprint boats therefore try to achieve the best time on the tracks. (Senderinfo).

programme.title: UIM F1H2O World Powerboat Championship 2025
programme.desc: Curtain up for Formula 1 in motorboat racing: According to the world umbrella organization UIM, the H20 is the fastest outboard racing boat series in circuit racing and has been dominated by Philippe Chiappe for years. (Station info).

programme.title: FIM X-Trial World Championship 2026
programme.desc: The Fédération Internationale de Motocyclisme has organized the X-Trial World Championship annually since 1993. In contrast to the outdoor discipline, the X-Trail competitions take place indoors. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2025
programme.desc: Would Superstock racing become a blueprint for Superbike racing? With another dominant performance from Hicky? The experts didn't really agree on this. A race full of surprises and an interesting podium. (Station info).

programme.title: FIM Supermoto World and European Championship 2025
Red Bull Romaniacs
programme.desc: The Romaniacs have become a permanent highlight in the hard enduro community's calendar. After some riders were denied the meeting last year, it was now even more beautiful in Sibiu. (Station info).

programme.title: Icelandic Formula Offroad 2025
programme.desc: Formula Off Road was invented in Iceland. Hoping to raise more money for the Icelandic rescue teams, the teams began showing their 4WD cars in action in the Icelandic hills. (Station info).

programme.title: All Wheel Drive Safari Challenge 2025
programme.desc: The "AWDC" is a British off-road event in which drivers have to tackle narrow and winding roads full of mud and gravel (channel info).

programme.title: US Pro Pulling 2023
programme.desc: Motorsport like you've never seen it before. In this competition, drivers use multi-engine, modified tractors to pull a heavy sled around the track. Some tractors can even produce more than 12,000 horsepower. This makes tractor pulling the strongest motorsport in the world. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2026
programme.desc: With the first Supersport race shortened to 3 laps, the question was whether Hicky could once again demonstrate his dominance from the Superbike race, whether Lee Johnston could repeat his success from last year or whether Michael Dunlup would live up to his role as favorite here. It was a hot fight! (Station info).

programme.title: Belgian Rally Championship 2026
programme.desc: The Belgian Rally Championship is one of the most competitive rally championships at national level. This also attracts prominent guest starters such as Thierry Neuville, Craig Breen and Stéphane Lefebvre. (Station info).

programme.title: BTRDA Rallycross 2025
programme.desc: The races of the British Trial and Rally Drivers Association, which was founded in 1938, are highly competitive. The rallycross track with changing surfaces challenges the best drivers in the world. (Station info).

programme.title: Tour European Rally 2026
programme.desc: The Tour European Rally 2023 traditionally starts with the promo event in Finland. The 58th edition of the spectacular Arctic Lapland Rally offers pure action and excitement on the snow and ice slopes of Finland. (Station info).

programme.desc: With us, television becomes a shopping mall: Our teleshopping partners bring interesting and innovative products from the areas of kitchen, household, beauty, wellness, leisure and fitness directly into the living room of TV viewers. (Station info).

programme.desc: With us, television becomes a shopping mall: Our teleshopping partners bring interesting and innovative products from the areas of kitchen, household, beauty, wellness, leisure and fitness directly into the living room of TV viewers. (Station info).

programme.title: The Dirty Seven
programme.desc: Emanuelle is trapped in the middle of a brutal war, as both sides set out to claim her. Unfortunately for them, Emanuelle is not only beautiful but quite intelligent and uses her charms to seduce the soldiers to gain an advantage.

programme.title: Twin Dragons
programme.desc: Jackie Chan plays a dual role as twins separated at birth who grow up and cross paths. Two brothers, one becomes a famous conductor and pianist in New York, another becomes a racecar driver and bodyguard in Hong Kong. When the conductor travels to Hong Kong to give a concert, the twins get caught up in each other's business, about which they are anything but experts.

programme.title: Detroit 9000
programme.desc: A pair of Detroit policemen investigates a robbery that occurred at a black congressman’s fundraising banquet.

programme.title: The Dirty Seven
programme.desc: Emanuelle is trapped in the middle of a brutal war, as both sides set out to claim her. Unfortunately for them, Emanuelle is not only beautiful but quite intelligent and uses her charms to seduce the soldiers to gain an advantage.

programme.title: Mozambique
programme.desc: An out-of-work and penniless American pilot is offered work in Mozambique and promptly becomes an unwitting pawn in a world of drug smuggling, kidnap and murder.

programme.title: The Glass House
programme.desc: After the parents of Ruby (Leelee Sobieski) and her younger brother, Rhett (Trevor Morgan), are killed in a car crash, their parents' best friends, Erin and Terry Glass (Diane Lane, Stellan Skarsgard), become their guardians. The children hear promises of a world of opulence and California fun -- all they have to do is move into the Glasses' gated house. Before very long, though, Ruby suspects that Erin and Terry may not be the ideal guardians they seemed to be.

programme.title: The Grasshopper
programme.desc: Christine Adams leaves her small town in British Columbia at age 19 to follow her boyfriend to L.A., where he works for a bank. She soon gets bored and moves to Las Vegas and becomes a showgirl, eventually slipping into prostitution.

programme.title: You Cant Win Em All
programme.desc: As the Ottoman Empire collapses throughout Turkey in 1922, a number of adventurers from all over the world sign on to protect the locals from thieves and marauders--for a hefty price. Two such mercenaries are Adam and Josh, who are hired by provincial Turkish governor Osman. Adam and Josh are expected to protect their boss' gold shipment, and to provide safe conduct for Osman Bey's three daughters. Along the way, our 'heroes' decide to forget their mission and abscond with the gold, but their plans are foiled by their own inherent ineptitude--and by the bothersome interference of duplicitous Colonel Elci.

programme.title: The Worm Eaters
programme.desc: A German hermit, who can talk with worms, seeks revenge on the town's mayor by putting mutant worms in everyone's meals and turning them into human worm slaves.

programme.title: Trinity Is Still My Name
programme.desc: Two brothers try to fulfill the promise they made to their dying father.

programme.desc: A mother fear that her daughter has been abducted when a phone call is interrupted by something suspicious.

programme.desc: Events planner Kelly meets her match in web editor Joe when planning his niece's birthday party.

programme.title: Falling for the Manny
programme.desc: Alice is up for partner at her firm and hires her sister’s manny, Jacob, to help with her daughter.

programme.title: New Dogs, Old Tricks
programme.desc: Liz and Kappa Psi Psi prep for Gamma Fair and T-shirt sales. Alan’s class inspires Anna’s look change.

programme.title: The Bouquet
programme.desc: Two estranged sisters set aside their differences to help their mother save her floral business.

programme.desc: Real-estate agent Lisa competes with developer Matthew who wants to buy her family's manor.

programme.title: Eat, Love, London
programme.desc: Stella takes a job at a new London restaurant and ends up falling for the chef.

programme.title: Campus Caller
programme.desc: When a university student goes missing, her mother a former cop goes in search for her.

programme.desc: Charley, the founder of a dating app must team up with marketing expert Liam, to save her company.

programme.title: Best Friend From Heaven
programme.desc: When her dog is killed, Tara cancels her wedding. But her dog's ghost and her small town have a surprise.

programme.title: Pure Country 2: The Gift
programme.desc: Three angels bestow the gift of song to a young girl, who rises to fame and fortune as a country music star.

programme.desc: PR exec Mikayla strikes a deal with pastry chef Austin to rebrand his café to get dating advice.

programme.title: Get Out Alive
programme.desc: An estranged couple on a retreat have to put aside their problems to survive their targetting by criminals.

programme.title: Til Death Do Us Part

programme.desc: When Emma is hired to bake for a royal cake, she finds herself at odds with a Prince.

programme.desc: In this true-crime story, cold-case investigators looking into a double murder elicit a series of confessions from a group of teens; years later, the teens recant their statements; aggressive tactics may have sent an innocent man to death row.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: Turlock, California
programme.desc: A criminal defense attorney known for uncovering corruption finds himself on trial; accused of a complex murder-for-hire plot, along with eight others, he fights to clear his name and show the holes in the state's case.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: Royse City, Texas
programme.desc: A couple are found brutally murdered in their home; investigators learn that the last person to see them alive had secrets of his own; some question whether prejudice led police to arrest the wrong man.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: Edgewater, Florida
programme.desc: A dentist is killed by a masked gunman; the media reports salacious details as investigators uncover a sinister plot led by the dentist's wife and stepson, but a private investigator shares a startling alternate theory.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: Adel, Georgia
programme.desc: The town of Adel, Ga., is rocked by a brutal robbery homicide, and locals quickly point to an outsider as the killer; over 20 years later, new evidence raises the startling question if an innocent man is serving life for another man's crime.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: Sauquoit, New York
programme.desc: When a beloved chiropractor in Sauquoit, N.Y., dies suddenly under strange circumstances, investigators discover she's been murdered with a rare poison; the killer could only be someone she knew closely, and the case divides the town.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: St. Augustine, Florida
programme.desc: A young woman in St. Augustine, Fla., with everything to live for is found shot to death with the gun belonging to her boyfriend, a deputy sheriff; he says it was suicide, but her family believes it was murder.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: Cookeville, Tennessee
programme.desc: When an immigrant couple who settled in the Tennessee town of Cookeville is executed in their sleep and their house set on fire, investigators identify a suspect with motive; in their rush to make an arrest, they may have gotten the wrong man.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: Shelbyville, Kentucky
programme.desc: In rural Shelbyville, Ky., a body is found in the river; years go by until the police catch the killer, but some in town question if the suspect is even capable of committing the crime.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: Rockville/Ellington, Connecticut
programme.desc: When a 22-year-old dancer goes missing, the men of the neighboring town who frequented the club she worked at become the suspect pool; wealth and status may protect a killer; a determined police officer works the case.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: Dallas, Ga
programme.desc: In this true-crime story, after a woman is found shot in her bathroom, officials launch a death investigation to determine if it was suicide -- as her husband claimed -- or murder; years later, the case remains open, and the town still has questions.

programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: Pocomoke City, Md
programme.desc: In this true-crime story, a young single mother disappears without a trace; an investigation suggests she abandoned her children, while her family spends years proving she was murdered and finding her killers.

programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: Angier, N.C

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: S6 E242 — Classics on the way to auctionIn this episode of Top Speed, presenter Martin Utberg visits the classic car gallery in Toffen, Switzerland.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: S1 E19 — Talbot Lago 2500 Sport Europa CoupeIt's the little man's Ferrari - the Fiat Dino Spider. For many it is the most beautiful Fiat ever built. There's actually a Ferrari engine working under the hood and it's making a lot of steam.

programme.title: Four-wheel drive adventure
programme.desc: S2 E21 — Episode 21This magazine deals with various off-road and all-wheel drive vehicles. It provides information about off-road veterans and cars with four-wheel drive. The vehicles are presented and their qualities are examined in more detail.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: S1 — VW Golf - The mega seller The VW Golf is considered a classic, is the most successful car in Europe and is not at all exciting. The program tells the success story of the car, which has been sold around 30 million times. It now has cult status.

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: Economically ecologicalThis documentation presents the development of sustainability in the automotive industry. The latest research and environmentally friendly concepts at the car shows are presented and various aspects are taken into account.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: S1 E22 — CruisingIn a tranquil village, a company assembles the coolest tricycles in the republic. With the quality seal "Made in Germany", the small company has developed into Europe's leading trike manufacturer in just under 25 years.

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: S1 E2 — Episode 2When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then the camera's broadcast is there. Among other things, breathtaking stunts by professional drivers will be shown.

programme.title: Spotted
programme.desc: Episode 26The car spotter team travels to the most exciting locations, events, car trade fairs and race tracks in the world. They are always looking for fast, beautiful and powerful cars, crazy tuning conversions, hot bikes and car nerds.

programme.title: NASCAR University
programme.desc: S2 E4 — Martin Truex JrMartin Truex Jr. is now one of the most famous personalities in the NASCAR world. In 2017, the driver won the Monster Energy NASCAR Cup Series. However, the path to becoming a NASCAR champion was not always easy for him.

programme.title: 4x4 - Das Allrad Magazin
programme.desc: S3 E72 — Midsize SUVsThere are SUV models that have proven themselves, such as the Range Rover. In addition to Range Rover-typical luxury, the Velar should particularly score points with its chic look. The Wrangler's design has remained almost the same for over 60 years.

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: E28 — Episode 28The show presents the latest trends and innovations from the automotive industry.

programme.title: Tuning - it doesn't get any lower!
programme.desc: S3 E8 — NKL Youngtimer RallyThe Nürburgring has lost none of its appeal for decades. The oldie and youngtimer scene is also addicted to the black Eifel asphalt. That's why over 100 racing oldies are on the traditional route.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: S3 E12 — Motorcycle ShootingA new test for the Stunt Heroes. They are supposed to create a spectacular motorcycle flight followed by a crash in a car. That would be far too dangerous even for a stuntman. That's why stunt coordinator Ramazan Bulut comes up with something and builds a cannon to shoot the motorcycle. Does it have enough power to throw the motorcycle quickly and sufficiently far into the air.

programme.title: Dumbest Stuff on Wheels
programme.desc: S2 E10 — Episode 23Humans and machines sometimes don't make a good mix. Especially when it comes to operating very heavy or fast vehicles. The program shows video recordings that provide evidence.

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: S2 E6 — PG BikesThe company PG Bikes is currently the most innovative bicycle company in Germany and is located right in Regensburg, Bavaria. The boss Manuel Ostner and his Regensburger team develop and manufacture electric bicycles with a retro look.

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: S2 E9 — Episode 22People in car professions such as car salesmen and scrap dealers are followed in the show.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: S1 E19 — Italian power bike Ducati XDiavelFor the first time in its glorious and long history, the traditional Italian brand Ducati is venturing into the cruiser segment. The 156 hp XDiavel is intended to conquer the US market and stand up to Harley-Davidson.

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: S16 E232 — Mobility from MorganIt is the vision of an electric future from AMG: The Concept AMG GT XX delivers an incredible 1360 hp and charges faster than you can say “range anxiety”. We were there for the spectacular world premiere.

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: S12 — Tenerife and La Gomera EXPERIENCE 2023, Part 3The magazine for motorcycle fans reports on biker clubs, tours, meetings and events.

programme.title: Classic
programme.desc: Episode 55The show is about classic cars and everything that goes with them: events, racing, portraits, mechanic tips and the most beautiful pictures from the automobile archives from all over the world. Cars from bygone eras are also on display.

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: S2 E32 — Episode 32We see what happens when ambition exceeds driving ability and racing professionals are carried out of the curve. Breathtaking stunts by professional drivers and spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed are presented.

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: S1 E19 — International LimousinesInternational limousines represent status, prestige and perfection more than any other car.

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: S6 E243 — Best of 250Top Speed ​​is celebrating a special anniversary. In this issue we look back at 250 episodes that we produced in German for Motorvision.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: S1 E20 — VW Karmann GhiaThe show rummages through the automotive treasure chest and brings to light some almost forgotten, some noble, some bizarre cars from the last few decades. No matter where - these extraordinary vehicles are absolute eye-catchers.

programme.title: Four-wheel drive adventure
programme.desc: S3 E31 — Episode 31This magazine deals with various off-road and all-wheel drive vehicles. It provides information about off-road veterans and cars with four-wheel drive. The vehicles are presented and their qualities are examined in more detail.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: S1 — Porsche MotorsportThe Porsche brand is more successful than any other. It is considered particularly fast and reliable. It has always been successful in the big races, such as Le Mans, the Monte Carlo Rally or Formula 1.

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: E66 — Compact E-City RunaboutCompact, modern, electric! E-SUVs are conquering our big cities. Volvo is sending the EX30 to attract customers. The brand's new smallest model is supposed to impress with Swedish coolness and plenty of power.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: S1 E23 - Driving experienceIn the Ford Focus ST 5 tournament, it quickly becomes clear through spoilers, wide tires, painted brake calipers, ST logos and, above all, the centrally positioned exhaust pipe that it is not intended for family vacations.

programme.title: Australian Superbike Championship 2024
programme.desc: S1 — Supersport 600, Queensland Raceway, QueenslandThe ASBK is an Australian motorcycle championship with up to seven events per season.

programme.title: Gearing Up 2026
programme.desc: The show provides insights into what happens at the world's most unique motorsport events.

programme.title: FastZone 2026
programme.desc: E5The show showcases some of the best motorsport moments, from karts to Formula One.

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: S16 — BMW M2High-performance models have a long-standing tradition at BMW. We take a close look at the current M2 and test its drifting potential, racing and everyday qualities. What does he do best? We also look at its history and development.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: S1 E102 — Robust and popularSubaru has renamed the XV. Renewed and with the new name Crosstrek, the SUV is now looking for customers - we reveal what's behind it. Cupra is giving its bestseller Formentor an update that is particularly causing a stir visually.

programme.title: 4x4 - Das Allrad Magazin
programme.desc: S3 E86 — Smart AdventuresThe Can-Am Outlander and Maverick R are the ultimate fun devices for off-road driving fun.

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: S14 — Ride Thailand 2025, Motorcycle Adventure Northern Thailand Part 5The north of Thailand is a popular travel destination, not only for adventurous individual tourists. The north is known for its mountainous, densely forested areas, making this region a paradise for motorcyclists. Thousands of curves on well-developed roads with little traffic and a diversity of culture and landscape make this region a perfect holiday destination for us to escape the winter in Germany for the fourth time.

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: E74 — Electric with BoostElectric cars can't be sporty? But yes - at least with the right boost. The Alpine A290 is intended to bring the brand's racing DNA into the electric age.

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2026
programme.desc: The Isle of Man Tourist Trophy is considered the toughest and most dangerous motorcycle race in the world, with riders reaching speeds of up to 200mph.

programme.title: UIM E1 World Championship 2025
programme.desc: No further information is available for this article.

programme.title: NZ Jetsprint Championship 2025
programme.desc: The New Zealand Jetsprint Championship is the most important sprint boat competition from New Zealand, the country where the sport was founded in 1981. Jetsprinting is comparable to rally sports, but there is only one boat on the track at any given time and boats drive at very high speeds. The up to 500 HP strong jet sprint boats therefore try to achieve the best time on the tracks.
