programme.title: 4x4 - Das Allrad Magazin
programme.desc: S3 E73 — Commercial VehiclesWith 3.5 million units sold worldwide, the Mercedes Sprinter is one of the most popular commercial vehicles. In the third generation it is more modern than ever. The magazine tests the model on the streets around Amsterdam.

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: E11 — Episode 112019 celebrated Porsche 70 years of sports car history. For this occasion, it was decided to recreate a completely new vehicle of the type 993, the unique Project Gold, based on an existing original bodyshell.

programme.title: Tuning - it doesn't get any lower!
programme.desc: S3 E15 — Alfa Romeo 147 GTAAlfa Romeo's latest creation is a GTA version of the 147. The already pretty design of the 147 has been properly trimmed towards sportiness. Voluminous air inlets and outlets as well as bulbous wheel arches suit it very well.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: S2 E11 — Alarm in the gravel pitA gravel pit becomes a stunt laboratory: The stunt heroes from Action Concept test for their favorite production "Alarm for Cobra 11". They send a motorcycle freestyle over a ramp and shoot themselves into the water with a specially built human catapult. They are also experimenting with a new system: This is designed to allow a prepared car to roll over several times in the sand at 70 km/h. Stuntwoman Tina takes over the job as driver.

programme.title: Dumbest Stuff on Wheels
programme.desc: S2 E11 — Episode 24Humans and machines sometimes don't make a good mix. Especially when it comes to operating very heavy or fast vehicles. The program shows video recordings that provide evidence.

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: S2 E7 — Knaus-TabbertThe Knaus Tabbert company from Jandelsbrunn is a manufacturer of luxury caravans and premium motorhomes. Alfred Tabbert produced the first caravan in series production as early as the 1950s. The next model followed in 1960.

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: S2 E12 — Episode 25Tonga is a constitutional monarchy. Peter Goldstern was already in the service of George Tupou the 5th's father. He is now one of the king's closest confidants and is the only one allowed to fly the royal plane.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: S1 E32 — Electric Motorcycle Festival and Can-AmA cool rattling in your ears - that's how you know motorcycling. But the future could look or sound different, and quietly. Is this still ¿real¿ motorcycling or does the electric drive completely rob you of the emotion.

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: S16 E233 — Fascination Mercedes S-ClassIt is considered the most successful luxury sedan in the world - a synonym for comfort and opulence - and sets standards in terms of technology and safety: The Mercedes S-Class. But why is that?

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle

programme.desc: Episode 60Aimo from Kuusankoski goes hunting for criminals with a very special company car: a '76 Trabant L 601. Timo is a talented hobbyist and turned his 1963 Škoda Octavia sedan into an original pickup.

programme.title: 4x4 - Das Allrad Magazin
programme.desc: S3 E74 — Porsche Cayenne eHybridPorsche is getting out of the diesel business. Hybrids like the Cayenne E-Hybrid should become more important. The average consumption was 3.2 liters. The region around Spartenburg was also explored in the BMW X4.

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: E3 — Episode 3On the occasion of Skoda's 125th company anniversary, this program looks back on the eventful history of one of the oldest automobile manufacturers in the world. It's also about a practical test of the Volkswagen ID.3.

programme.title: Tuning - it doesn't get any lower!
programme.desc: S3 E22 — FighteramaThe sports and tuning trade fair 'Fighterama' is the annual meeting place for customizing and tuning.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: S2 E9 — Somersault in the Cola TruckStunt coordinator Christoph Domanski tests the feasibility of an accident sequence for a new film shoot. A car is said to be overturned at an intersection by a beverage truck standing across it - including crates of beverages flying around. Locksmith Uwe, together with the stuntwomen Tina and Teresa, prepares the truck for the shooting, stuntman Nick pads the cage of his stunt car.

programme.title: Dumbest Stuff on Wheels
programme.desc: S2 E12 — Episode 25Humans and machines sometimes don't make a good mix. Especially when it comes to operating very heavy or fast vehicles. The program shows video recordings that provide evidence.

programme.desc: S1 — From retro to electric motorcycle riding fun is diverse. Some like retro, others look to the future. We test the Royal Enfield Shotgun 650 in an old-school look and reveal exciting facts about the Indian manufacturer with British roots.

programme.desc: Episode 21In Germany, the Reliant Scimitar is virtually unknown, but in England it is a car with a kind of cult status. This is probably why the British royal family used this vehicle as a means of transport for many years.

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: E68 — Sporty electric cars are emotionless and boring? These electric cars want to prove the opposite: the VW ID. Buzz GTX throws all-wheel drive and 340 hp into the ring. But how athletic is he really? And this one isn't an electric car at all.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: S1 E25 - Groundbreaking, innovative and sportyIn the comparison test, the Audi A1 quattro and the Renault Clio R.S. opposite. The Audi A1 quattro has a 1.2 liter 4-cylinder turbo engine with 256 hp. The top speed is 245 kilometers per hour.

programme.title: GAMING: CEB - The comeback of Sébastien Debs
programme.desc: Professional French Dota 2 player Sébastien Debs “Ceb” returns from retirement for the ESL One Stockholm Major tournament. He joins a team of young players and encourages them to do their best. In the group phase they begin to believe in themselves and begin a winning streak that lasts all the way to the final. With Ceb's support, the team performs at their best and achieves victory.

programme.title: Red Bull Jukebox: The show with HECHT
programme.desc: The show of your choice: the Swiss band HECHT takes on the Red Bull Jukebox challenge one evening. The fans determine the course of this unique concert.

programme.title: Red Bull Soundclash Challenge
programme.desc: S1 E3 — Badmómzjay performs at a height of 3,000 metersTo pass the third challenge, Badmómzjay has to climb to a height of up to 3,000 meters this time.
